items.title: ENKA İnşaat ve Sanayi A.Ş. Sustainability Report 2024
items.content:
ENKA İnşaat ve Sanayi A.Ş. has released its Sustainability Report for 2024.

The announcement states that ENKA İnşaat ve Sanayi A.Ş. has published its 2024 Sustainability Report. The report is available as a PDF document attached to the announcement and is also accessible on the company's website for investors' information. This report likely details the company's environmental, social, and governance (ESG) performance and initiatives.
